inputs.label: Batch Size (g)
inputs.businessContext: Production batch size in grams, typical lab scale is 1000g.

businessContext_i18n.en: Production batch size in grams, typical lab scale is 1000g.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gram cinsinden üretim parti büyüklüğü, tipik laboratuvar ölçeği 1000g'dir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Produktionschargengröße in Gramm, typischer Labormaßstab 1000 g.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille de lot de production en grammes, l'échelle laboratoire typique est de 1000 g.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tamaño de lote de producción en gramos, escala típica de laboratorio es 1000 g.

inputs.label: Unit Weight (g)
inputs.businessContext: Weight per finished product unit (e.g., a foundation is 30g, a lipstick 4g).

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight per finished product unit (e.g., a foundation is 30g, a lipstick 4g).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitmiş ürün birimi başına ağırlık (örneğin, bir fondöten 30g, bir ruj 4g).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht pro fertigem Produkt (z. B. eine Foundation 30 g, ein Lippenstift 4 g).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids par unité de produit fini (ex. un fond de teint fait 30 g, un rouge à lèvres 4 g).
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso por unidad de producto terminado (ej., una base es 30 g, un labial 4 g).

inputs.label: Material Cost per Gram
inputs.businessContext: Average bulk raw material cost per gram including all ingredients.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average bulk raw material cost per gram including all ingredients.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm bileşenler dahil gram başına ortalama toplu hammadde maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Rohmaterialkosten pro Gramm inklusive aller Inhaltsstoffe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen des matières premières en vrac par gramme, tous ingrédients compris.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste medio de materia prima a granel por gramo, incluyendo todos los ingredientes.

inputs.label: Container Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Packaging and container cost per finished product unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Packaging and container cost per finished product unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitmiş ürün birimi başına ambalaj ve kap maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verpackungs- und Behälterkosten pro fertigem Produkt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de l'emballage et du contenant par unité de produit fini.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de embalaje y envase por unidad de producto terminado.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor cost allocated per finished product unit.

label_i18n.es: Coste de mano de obra por unidad

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct labor cost allocated per finished product unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitmiş ürün birimi başına tahsis edilen doğrudan işçilik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Arbeitskosten, die pro fertigem Produkt anfallen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût direct de main-d'œuvre alloué par unité de produit fini.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de mano de obra directa asignado por unidad de producto terminado.

inputs.label: Overhead (%)
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturing overhead as a percentage of total direct cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Manufacturing overhead as a percentage of total direct cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam doğrudan maliyetin yüzdesi olarak üretim genel gideri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fertigungsgemeinkosten als Prozentsatz der gesamten direkten Kosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais généraux de fabrication en pourcentage du coût direct total.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos generales de fabricación como porcentaje del coste directo total.

inputs.label: Desired Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Profit margin markup on total cost per unit to determine selling price.

businessContext_i18n.en: Profit margin markup on total cost per unit to determine selling price.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satış fiyatını belirlemek için birim başına toplam maliyet üzerine kâr marjı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewinnmargenaufschlag auf die Gesamtkosten pro Stück zur Bestimmung des Verkaufspreises.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Majoration de marge bénéficiaire sur le coût total par unité pour déterminer le prix de vente.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de beneficio sobre el coste total por unidad para determinar el precio de venta.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
